title: Refactor OCP-002 (OCP): Extensive if-else if and switch statements for parsing logic violate OCP.

detected_issue.description: Extensive if-else if and switch statements for parsing logic violate OCP.
detected_issue.reasoning: The `doPeek()` method contains multiple `if-else if` and `switch` statements that handle different `JsonScope` states and character parsing rules. Any addition of new JSON structures, parsing rules, or token types would necessitate modifying this method, making it closed for extension without modification.
